Content:
# Awesome Awesome AI ✨

[![X Follow][x-image]][x-url]
[![PRs Welcome][pr-image]][pr-url]
[![License][license-image]][license-url]

An awesome list for collecting awesome lists related to AI.

## Contents

- [AI Agent Rules & Config](#ai-agent-rules--config)
- [AI Coding](#ai-coding)
- [Chatbots & Assistants](#chatbots--assistants)
- [Generative AI](#generative-ai)
- [LLMs & Models](#llms--models)
- [Prompt Engineering](#prompt-engineering)

## AI Agent Rules & Config

| Resource | Description | Stars | Last Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [System Prompts & Models of AI Tools](https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools) | A curated collection of system prompts, internal tool configurations, and model instructions of AI tools. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools?style=flat) |
| [awesome-design-md](https://github.com/voltagent/awesome-design-md) | A collection of DESIGN.md files inspired by popular brand design systems for coding agents to generate matching UI. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/voltagent/awesome-design-md?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/voltagent/awesome-design-md?style=flat) |
| [awesome-cursorrules](https://github.com/PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules) | A curated list of awesome .cursorrules files for enhancing the Cursor AI code editor experience. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules?style=flat) |

## AI Coding

| Resource | Description | Stars | Last Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [Awesome AI-Powered Developer Tools](https://github.com/jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools) | Curated list of AI-powered developer tools. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools?style=flat) |
| [Awesome Vibe Coding](https://github.com/taskade/awesome-vibe-coding) | A curated list of vibe coding tools, platforms, and resources for building software through natural language prompts. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/taskade/awesome-vibe-coding?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/taskade/awesome-vibe-coding?style=flat) |

## Chatbots & Assistants

| Resource | Description | Stars | Last Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [ChatGPT 中文调教指南](https://github.com/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh) | 一个收集了关于 ChatGPT 中文调教的指南和优秀的调教案例的资源列表。 | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh?style=flat) |
| [Awesome ChatGPT](https://github.com/humanloop/awesome-chatgpt) | Curated list of awesome tools, demos, docs for ChatGPT and GPT-3. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/humanloop/awesome-chatgpt?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/humanloop/awesome-chatgpt?style=flat) |
| [Awesome GPT-3](https://github.com/elyase/awesome-gpt3) | A collection of demos and articles about the OpenAI GPT-3 API. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/elyase/awesome-gpt3?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/elyase/awesome-gpt3?style=flat) |
| [ChatGPT3 Prompt Engineering](https://github.com/mattnigh/ChatGPT3-Free-Prompt-List) | A free guide for learning to create ChatGPT3 Prompts. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/mattnigh/ChatGPT3-Free-Prompt-List?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/mattnigh/ChatGPT3-Free-Prompt-List?style=flat) |
Translation:
# Awesome Awesome AI ✨

[![X Follow][x-image]][x-url]
[![PRs Welcome][pr-image]][pr-url]
[![License][license-image]][license-url]

Una lista impresionante para recopilar listas impresionantes relacionadas con IA.

## Contenidos

- [Reglas y Configuración de Agentes de IA](#ai-agent-rules--config)
- [Codificación de IA](#ai-coding)
- [Chatbots y Asistentes](#chatbots--assistants)
- [IA Generativa](#generative-ai)
- [LLMs y Modelos](#llms--models)
- [Ingeniería de Prompts](#prompt-engineering)

## Reglas y Configuración de Agentes de IA

| Recurso | Descripción | Estrellas | Último Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [System Prompts & Models of AI Tools](https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools) | Una colección seleccionada de prompts de sistema, configuraciones internas de herramientas e instrucciones de modelos de herramientas de IA. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools?style=flat) |
| [awesome-design-md](https://github.com/voltagent/awesome-design-md) | Una colección de archivos DESIGN.md inspirados en sistemas de diseño de marcas populares para agentes de codificación que generan interfaces de usuario compatibles. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/voltagent/awesome-design-md?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/voltagent/awesome-design-md?style=flat) |
| [awesome-cursorrules](https://github.com/PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules) | Una lista seleccionada de impresionantes archivos .cursorrules para mejorar la experiencia del editor de código Cursor AI. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules?style=flat) |

## Codificación de IA

| Recurso | Descripción | Estrellas | Último Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [Awesome AI-Powered Developer Tools](https://github.com/jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools) | Lista seleccionada de herramientas de desarrollo impulsadas por IA. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/jamesmurdza/awesome-ai-devtools?style=flat) |
| [Awesome Vibe Coding](https://github.com/taskade/awesome-vibe-coding) | Una lista seleccionada de herramientas, plataformas y recursos de vibe coding para construir software mediante prompts en lenguaje natural. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/taskade/awesome-vibe-coding?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/taskade/awesome-vibe-coding?style=flat) |

## Chatbots y Asistentes

| Recurso | Descripción | Estrellas | Último Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [ChatGPT 中文调教指南](https://github.com/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh) | Una lista de recursos que recopila guías y excelentes casos de ajuste de ChatGPT en chino. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/PlexPt/awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh?style=flat) |
| [Awesome ChatGPT](https://github.com/humanloop/awesome-chatgpt) | Lista seleccionada de impresionantes herramientas, demostraciones y documentación para ChatGPT y GPT-3. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/humanloop/awesome-chatgpt?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/humanloop/awesome-chatgpt?style=flat) |
| [Awesome GPT-3](https://github.com/elyase/awesome-gpt3) | Una colección de demostraciones y artículos sobre la API GPT-3 de OpenAI. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/elyase/awesome-gpt3?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/elyase/awesome-gpt3?style=flat) |
| [ChatGPT3 Prompt Engineering](https://github.com/mattnigh/ChatGPT3-Free-Prompt-List) | Una guía gratuita para aprender a crear prompts para ChatGPT3. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/mattnigh/ChatGPT3-Free-Prompt-List?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/mattnigh/ChatGPT3-Free-Prompt-List?style=flat) |

Content:
## Generative AI

| Resource | Description | Stars | Last Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [Awesome Generative AI](https://github.com/steven2358/awesome-generative-ai) | A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/steven2358/awesome-generative-ai?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/steven2358/awesome-generative-ai?style=flat) |
| [Awesome AIGC Tutorials](https://github.com/luban-agi/Awesome-AIGC-Tutorials) | Curated tutorials and resources for Large Language Models, AI Painting, and more. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/luban-agi/Awesome-AIGC-Tutorials?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/luban-agi/Awesome-AIGC-Tutorials?style=flat) |
| [Awesome Open Source AI](https://github.com/alvinreal/awesome-opensource-ai) | Curated list of notable open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/alvinreal/awesome-opensource-ai?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/alvinreal/awesome-opensource-ai?style=flat) |
| [Awesome-AI](https://github.com/runningcheese/Awesome-AI) | 你的《人工智能指南》，收集了有关 AI 的工具、平台和使用教程等。 | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/runningcheese/Awesome-AI?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/runningcheese/Awesome-AI?style=flat) |

## LLMs & Models

| Resource | Description | Stars | Last Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [Open LLMs](https://github.com/eugeneyan/open-llms) | A list of open LLMs available for commercial use. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/eugeneyan/open-llms?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/eugeneyan/open-llms?style=flat) |

## Prompt Engineering

| Resource | Description | Stars | Last Commit |
|----------|-------------|-------|-------------|
| [Prompts Chat](https://github.com/f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts) | A community hub for sharing and discovering AI prompts. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts?style=flat) |
| [Prompt Engineering Guide](https://github.com/dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide) | A comprehensive guide to prompt engineering, context engineering, RAG, and AI agents with LLMs. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide?style=flat) |
| [Awesome Nano Banana Pro Prompts](https://github.com/YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-nano-banana-pro-prompts) | Curated Nano Banana Pro prompts with multilingual examples and preview images. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-nano-banana-pro-prompts?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-nano-banana-pro-prompts?style=flat) |
| [Awesome Prompt Engineering](https://github.com/promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering) | Hand-curated collection of resources for Prompt Engineering and Context Engineering, including guides, tools, and datasets. | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering?style=flat) |
| [免费 Prompt Engineering 教程](https://github.com/thinkingjimmy/Learning-Prompt) | 一个免费的 Prompt Engineering 教程，提供从入门到高级的学习资料和案例分析。 | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/thinkingjimmy/Learning-Prompt?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/thinkingjimmy/Learning-Prompt?style=flat) |
| [Prompt 编写模式：如何将思维框架赋予机器](https://github.com/phodal/prompt-patterns) | 以设计模式的形式来思考 prompt，一份关于如何将思维框架赋予机器的指南。 | ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/phodal/prompt-patterns?style=flat) | ![last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/phodal/prompt-patterns?style=flat) |
